ab: Sediq tnpcamac alang ka tama mu.
ch: 我的爸爸是部落的獵人。
en: My dad is a hunter of the tribe.

ab: Claqi ku cida, tama mu mi swayi snaw tama pa hay; mniq kman musa nganguc, madas puting mi puniq musa tnpcamac.
ch: 我小的時候，爸爸和叔叔會在晚上出門，帶著獵刀和獵槍去打獵。
en: When I was little, my dad and uncle would go out at night with hunting knives and guns.

ab: Mncul mangal boyak mi mncul mangal rapic, kiya mi mncul mangal ulaqan uri.
ch: 有時候是山豬、有時候是飛鼠，偶爾也會有雉雞。
en: At daybreak, they returned with their prey.

ab: Mniq tmayan alang; dwanun dha masu sediq alang ka nangal dha ccamac.
ch: 他們會在村口將獵物分享給族人。
en: Sometimes it was a boar, sometimes a flying squirrel, and occasionally a pheasant.

ab: Knttu ku sntunux rmngaw tama mu, mpsnul ku tama musa tnpcamac lmiqu.
ch: 我每次都會吵著爸爸，要跟著爸爸去打獵。
en: They would divide the prey at the entrance of the village and share it with the tribe.

ab: Rngawan ku na ka tama mu “Paru su daw, kiya dsun misu mcbu mi posa wasil da.”
ch: 爸爸說等我長大了他再帶我一起去。
en: Every time I quarreled with my father, I wanted to go hunting with my father.

ab: Mkla musa dmurang ccmac lmiqu ka snaw alang, posa snalu na srak mi dmangar uri.
ch: 部落的男人也會用陷阱抓獵物，他們會製作套索陷阱和石壓式陷阱。
en: The men of the tribe also trap their prey, making lasso traps and rock traps.

ab: Mkla bay smalu durang ka tama mu, rmngaw ka “tama, ddiyun qmraq tkurih ka ni, asi bay klaun kmuruy ta dapil camac ka ita, psaun tuqar camac ka durang.
ch: 我的爸爸很會製作套索陷阱，爸爸說，這是用來捕抓雉雞的，我們要仔細觀察獵物的腳印，陷阱要放在獵物走的路上。
en: My dad is very good at making lasso traps. Dad said that this is used to catch pheasants. We have to carefully observe the footprints of the prey, and the traps should be placed on the path of the prey.

ab: Alaw iyux ku bay nhari smnul rdrudan musa tnpcamac, kddiyax ku smluhay smalu durang, ida kiya so balay bay ini biyaw qmraq ccamac ka smnalu mu durang da.
ch: 為了可以趕快和大人一起去打獵，我每天練習製作陷阱，很快地我的陷阱就真的可以抓到獵物了。
en: In order to go hunting with adults as soon as possible, I practice making traps every day, and soon my traps can really catch prey.

ab: Qmita ka tama mu da u rmngaw knan, hiti daw qulung ku mosa msediq balay mkla tnpcamac ka yaku.
ch: 爸爸看到後對我說我以後一定會是很厲害的獵人。
en: In order to go hunting with adults as soon as possible, I practiced making traps every day, and soon my traps can really catch prey.

ab: Paru ku mnhdu mdakil ka saya da, mapa ku nanaq bhniq mi budi mu, smnul ku tama mu msupu musa tnpcamac.
ch: 現在我長大了，我背起我的弓和箭矢，跟著爸爸一起去打獵。
en: Now that I have grown up, I carry my bow and arrows and go hunting with my father.

ab: Dhuq alang cida, nangal dha camac u psun dha masu dsediq alang.
ch: 回村時將獵到的獵物和族人們分享。
en: When returning to the village, share the hunted prey with the tribe.

ab: Rmngaw ka tama, qrasun ta dmahur ka Utux Tmninun pndungus snbliqan, dhuq ta mangal ou bay ccamac, kiya mi dhurun ta ka utux rudan uri, msupu ta mqaras kana!
ch: 爸爸說，我們要感謝編織之神的賜福，讓我們有很多獵物收穫，並告慰祖靈；一同歡樂!
en: Dad said, we want to thank the ancestors for their blessings, so that we have a lot of prey to harvest.
